label: Work type
description: Defines one work type assignable to colonists, such as Mining, Cooking, or Hauling. Referenced by PawnColumnDef.workType for generated work-priority columns.

labelShort.label: Label short
labelShort.description: Short translated name shown in the work tab column header.

pawnLabel.label: Pawn label
pawnLabel.description: Translated noun describing a pawn who performs this work, e.g. 'miner', 'cook'.

gerundLabel.label: Gerund label
gerundLabel.description: Translated gerund describing this work activity, e.g. 'Mining', 'Cooking'.

verb.label: Verb
verb.description: Translated verb used in activity strings, e.g. 'mine', 'cook'.

visible.label: Visible
visible.description: If false, this work type is hidden from the work tab and cannot be assigned. Default true.

visibleOnlyWithChildrenInColony.label: Visible only with children in colony
visibleOnlyWithChildrenInColony.description: If true, this work type only appears when at least one juvenile pawn is in the colony.

naturalPriority.label: Natural priority
naturalPriority.description: Determines the default relative priority of this work type among all work types. Must be between 0 and 10000.

alwaysStartActive.label: Always start active
alwaysStartActive.description: If true, all colonists always have this work type enabled regardless of their individual settings.

requireCapableColonist.label: Require capable colonist
requireCapableColonist.description: If true, this work type is only shown when there is at least one capable colonist who can perform it.

relevantSkills.label: Relevant skills
relevantSkills.description: SkillDefs that are levelled by and affect the quality of this work type.

disabledForSlaves.label: Disabled for slaves
disabledForSlaves.description: If true, enslaved colonists cannot be assigned to this work type.
